line_style: 粗粝硬朗+水墨毛边,2-3px轮廓+0.5-1px细节
render: 水墨晕染+数字厚涂,ink-bleed texture
lighting: 侧光+点光源(灯笼/火),高对比chiaroscuro
prompt_keywords: Chinese dark ink-wash realistic manga style, fusion of traditional Chinese ink painting texture, Japanese dark manga high-contrast dramatic lighting, chiaroscuro, ink-bleed texture, bold brush strokes
negative_keywords: bright, cheerful, pastel, anime, cute, 3d render, photorealistic, western architecture

fp_examples.action: 主角背着法器踏入荒废村落,乌鸦惊飞
主角在祠堂内点燃符纸,观察墙上的诡异刻痕
主角拔出桃木剑与井中涌出的黑影对峙
主角收剑入鞘,踏上归途,身后雾气散去

prompt_example: A lone exorcist stands at the entrance of an abandoned village at dusk, crows scattering from withered branches overhead, the exorcist gripping a peach-wood sword with tense fingers, ink-wash texture with high contrast chiaroscuro, moody wide shot from eye level with rule of thirds composition, dark atmospheric Chinese ink painting style --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 驱魔录·暗黑水墨
✅ 允许场景: 荒村/深山/破庙/古道/竹林 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 现代都市/科幻/西方建筑/赛博朋克
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要默认用'雨夜古宅',必须根据故事内容选择场景
氛围: 阴森肃杀,水墨质感
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Do NOT default to 'rainy ancient mansion' unless the story explicitly mentions it. Use dark ink-wash style with Chinese supernatural atmosphere. Do NOT use modern cities, sci-fi, or Western architecture.
meta_prompt: Chinese dark ink-wash manga style, traditional ink painting texture, high-contrast chiaroscuro lighting, bold brush strokes, supernatural atmosphere, muted earth tones with warm accent light

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 文化研究者·深度解读志怪
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 专家级文化符号解读, 需传统文化底蕴

reader_constraint.reader_state: 文化探索者·期待志怪美学深度
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 水墨意境+志怪符号+东方神秘

visual_frequency.HF: 符箓/妖物核心/朱砂印记(高频符号锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 水墨晕染/衣袂飘动/山石轮廓(中频意境)
visual_frequency.LF: 留白/远山/雾气(低频禅意)
visual_frequency.progression: HF朱砂点睛破墨色, MF水墨晕染造意境, LF留白生禅意
